name: Shoutmon X4

signature_move.name: Burning Star Crusher
signature_move.description: Cuts any opponent in two with a single stroke.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese A miraculous form called the " Victory Mode ", born from four Digimon's powerful desire to gain absolute victory. Its raison d'être is nothing but enforcing this conviction. That power is tremendous, and it isn't a mistake to count it as one of the strongest Digimon. Its main specialty is in battling on the ground, where it can cut any opponent in two with a single stroke, even if they are moving about quickly ( Burning Star Crusher ), use a comeback punch that will find it a way out of any predicament ( Three Impact ), and so forth. Incidentally, it can also hurl a wave from the Star Sword DX ( Burning Star Slasher ).
